name: THERMOTRAFFIC.COM
message: [AI generated] Thermotraffic is a global specialist in temperature-controlled logistics, managing a range of cold chain solutions across numerous industries. They provide both road and sea transportation, along with all-inclusive logistics services, for perishable goods. Headquartered in Germany, they have an international network and operate around the clock to ensure customer satisfaction, with major focus on quality, safety and the environment.
